version_description: This is the Moonlight Version of the song Stargazing. ( Spotify link: https://open.spotify.com/track/6IdFbZkzvaS7apASHareqI?si=559af8775190452a ) ( Youtube link: https://youtu.be/FdyPe0KFtiw?si=g2L0ODZ15kIR79BB ).

versions.version_description: Basic Chords for song on Capo 4, written day of release.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
------ Stargazing - Moonlight Version ------

[Intro]
[ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
Time stood still just like a photograph[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
You made me feel like this would last forever[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
Lookin' in your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]
I see my whole life[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
Oh oooh oh[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m7[/ch]                                      [ch]B[/ch]
They say you know it when you know it, and I know[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
Oh oooh oh[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m7[/ch]                                      [ch]B[/ch]
Promise that you'll hold me close, don't let me go[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Take my heart, don't break it[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
Love me to my bones[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]C#m7[/ch]
All this time I've wasted[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
You were right there all along[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]C#m7[/ch]
You and I stargazin'[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
Intertwinin' souls[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]C#m7[/ch]
We were never strangers[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]
You were right there all along[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
I lose my mind[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]C#m7[/ch]
When I'm around you, how I come alive[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
When I'm without you, I can't help but feel so lost[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m7[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]
I wanna give you all I've got[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
Oh oooh oh[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m7[/ch]                                      [ch]B[/ch]
They say you know it when you know it, and I know[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
Oh oooh oh[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m7[/ch]                                      [ch]B[/ch]
Promise that you'll hold me close, don't let me go[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Take my heart, don't break it[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
Love me to my bones[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]C#m7[/ch]
All this time I've wasted[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
You were right there all along[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]C#m7[/ch]
You and I stargazin'[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
Intertwinin' souls[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]C#m7[/ch]
We were never strangers[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]
You were right there all along[/tab]

[Bridge]
[ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] x2


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Take my heart, don't break it[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
Love me to my bones[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]C#m7[/ch]
All this time I've wasted[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]
You were right there all along[/tab]
